website.title: MeetifyNow - Simple Meeting Scheduling Tool
website.description: MeetifyNow is a simple-to-use meeting scheduling tool that doesn't require logging in. The perfect solution for quick online scheduling!

home.headerText: MeetifyNow is a simple-to-use meeting scheduling tool that doesn't require logging in.
home.title: Meeting scheduling has never been easier!

fast.title: Fast and easy
fast.text: MeetifyNow is your way to schedule meetings quickly and easily! Create them in seconds. Our app is easy to use and will make organizing meetings a pleasure.

everyone.title: For everyone
everyone.text: Whether you're having a business meeting or a social gathering, use MeetifyNow and enjoy a fast, simple, and fun planning process!

time.title: Don't waste time logging in
time.text: With MeetifyNow, scheduling meetings becomes even easier - you can do it without logging in! Save valuable time and schedule your meetings in no time!

online.title: Select availability online
online.text: Our app allows you to select your availability for a meeting, even if you are only available remotely! Fully customize your meeting schedule to suit your needs.

flexibleHours.title: Custom Hours
flexibleHours.text: Don't be limited to standard time slots! MeetifyNow allows you to create meetings at any time, adapting to your individual schedule.

items.title: No signup required
items.desc: Start planning right away, without wasting time creating accounts and passwords.

items.title: Calendar view
items.desc: Clear, intuitive interface making it easy to find a common date quickly.

items.title: Smart suggestions
items.desc: The system automatically suggests optimal time windows for the whole group.

howItWorks.subtitle: How does it work?
howItWorks.title: Plan. Choose. Meet.
howItWorks.description: Three simple steps separate you and your team from a perfectly matched schedule. No getting lost in emails.

steps.title: 1. Propose dates
steps.desc: Choose a few convenient options and pack them into a generated link.

steps.title: 2. Send and vote
steps.desc: Share the view with your group. Everyone votes anonymously and efficiently.

steps.title: 3. Perfect time
steps.desc: MeetifyNow will highlight the solution that suits the most people within seconds.

cta.title: Simple to use. Powerful in action.
cta.description: Stop exchanging dozens of messages searching for a single matching date. Join satisfied users.

meetings.title: Your meetings
meetings.noMeetings: You haven't created any meetings yet.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
password.match: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number and a special character.

name.min: Name must be at least 2 characters long.

error.createFailed: Failed to create meeting. Please try again.

success.title: Meeting created!
success.subtitle: Share this link with your participants:

three.title: Choose Meeting Times
three.description: Select a uniform time range during which participants can declare their availability on the previously chosen days.

meeting__name.min: Meeting name must be at least 4 characters long.
meeting__name.max: Meeting name can have a maximum of 50 characters.

meeting__place.max: Meeting place can have a maximum of 100 characters.

date.required: Select a date for the meeting.
date.max: You can select up to 15 dates.

answerMeeting.nobodyAvailable: Nobody is available on the selected date 😥
answerMeeting.clickToReveal: Click on a time to see availability
answerMeeting.hoverToReveal: Hover over the hour to see availability

name.max: Your name can have a maximum of 20 characters.

error.alreadyAnswered: You have already answered this meeting.
error.submitFailed: Failed to send your answer. Please try again.

answerMeeting.firstToAnswer: Be the first to respond! Select your availability on the right.

answerNotFoundPage.title: No such appointment found 😥
answerNotFoundPage.heading: You can always create your own 😎

footer.description: Simple and quick scheduling of mutual meetings without registration and unnecessary steps.
